release.commit_message:
chore(upstream): sync VPN port forwarding changes from hotio

- Rework VPN port forwarding to use --torrenting-port CLI argument
  instead of API calls (works regardless of auth settings)
- Simplify forwarded_port_update_app (now just kills process to restart)
- Remove default qBittorrent.conf (qBittorrent creates its own)
- Remove config installation from init-setup-app
- Enable ARM64 smoke tests in CI
- Delete legacy branch (matching upstream)
